case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. LINDA JOHNSON et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF JURY FEES AND EXPENSES PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT JOHNSON, LINDA

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUN-11-2008 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT LINDA JOHNSON'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY GIVEN TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: E. BURA; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR# 4280 (D206)

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUN-11-2008 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT LINDA JOHNSON'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION AS TO JURY EXPENSES AND FEES AND COURT REPORTER FEES. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY GIVEN TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: E. BURA; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR# 4280 (D206)
